title: myosotis olympica subsp. demawendica
intro: Myosotis olympica subsp. demawendica, also known as the alpine forget-me-not, is a plant species endemic to the Demavend mountain range in Iran. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and potentially exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the alpine forget-me-not are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
